name: mediflow
description: AI Healthcare Navigation & Patient Care Coordination Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd api && npm run dev" "cd app && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=api && npm run build --workspace=app
scripts.db:push: cd api && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd api && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd api && npx prisma migrate reset --force
